case_title: GOLDEN GATE VOLKSWAGEN VS S.N. SANDS CORPORATION DBA S & S TRUCKING et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE VOLKSWAGEN AS TO DEFENDANT S.N. SANDS CORPORATION DBA S & S TRUCKING MARKH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE VOLKSWAGEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S.N. SANDS CORPORATION DBA S & S TRUCKING $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00, DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE AS TO HILSENDAGER MARK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MARK HILSENDAGER RETURNED MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS.
